title: Oil Rises as US and Iran Set to Halt Attacks Following Flare-Up
summary: Oil rose after a report that the US and Iran agreed to stop attacking each other, following a flare-up that saw a supertanker carrying Qatari crude hit near the Strait of Hormuz.

title: US Futures Climb on Reports Peace Talks to Resume: Markets Wrap
summary: US equity-index futures climbed after reports that the US and Iran backed away from a fresh escalation that had threatened the fragile ceasefire underpinning peace talks.
